description: VakantieDiscounter is a Dutch online travel company that sells package holidays combining flights and accommodation to destinations worldwide. Its website focuses on searching and booking vacation packages, including sun holidays, city trips, last minutes, and all-inclusive trips.
summary: VakantieDiscounter exposes a public MCP server at `https://mcp.vakantiediscounter.nl`; no public HTTP/GraphQL APIs or CLIs were found for developers.
